title: icy delicate thai coconut rice kanom ko
description: A tangy and springy Thai dish featuring the flavors of marsala wine and fermentation, all wrapped up in the delicate form of kanom ko.
instructions: Cook the jasmine rice according to package instructions.
In a separate pan, heat 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil over medium heat.
Add the sliced shallots and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the galangal and cook for another 2-3 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the marsala wine and cook until reduced by half, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the fish sauce, lemon juice, sugar, and salt, stirring to combine.
Add the cooked jasmine rice to the pan and stir-fry for about 2-3 minutes.
Add the cubed tofu and stir-fry until the rice is well coated with the sauce.
Transfer the rice mixture to a serving platter or individual plates.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve immediately.
